ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_records" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "year_period" TEXT /* Time period during which the tests were conducted (e.g., 1945-1949) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the tests were conducted */,
  "number_of_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted during the specified time period */,
  "test_series" TEXT /* Name of the test series (e.g., Trinity, Operation Crossroads) */,
  "total_yield" REAL /* Total yield of all tests in the series (in megatons) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., atmospheric, underground, underwater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_records_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the country is located */,
  "nuclear_program_start_date" TEXT /* Date the country started its nuclear program */,
  "nuclear_program_end_date" TEXT /* Date the country ended its nuclear program (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the test site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test site */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the test site is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the test site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the test site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of test site (e.g., land, sea, air) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the test site (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sites_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_site_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test site history record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the test site opened */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the test site closed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test site (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_site_histories_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_site_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, study) */,
  "doc_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "yield_megatons" REAL /* Yield of the test in megatons */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the nuclear device used in the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., atmospheric, underground) */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the test (e.g., weapons development, safety testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_event_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test event */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, study) */,
  "doc_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_event_documents_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES test_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the agreement or treaty */,
  "signing_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was signed */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agreement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agreement (e.g., in force, expired, ratified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_agreement_signatures" (
  "signature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signature */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that signed the agreement */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the international agreement or treaty */,
  "signature_date" TEXT /* Date the country signed the agreement */,
  "ratification_date" TEXT /* Date the country ratified the agreement (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_agreement_signatures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_agreement_signatures_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES international_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event occurred */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., test record, document) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance action */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that took the action */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the international agreement or treaty */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Current status of the action (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_actions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_actions_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES international_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement action */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country that was enforced against */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the international agreement or treaty */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the enforcement action taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Current status of the action (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_actions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_actions_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES international_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site or other location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location name or description */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geo_type" TEXT /* Type of geospatial data (e.g., point, polygon, line) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "article_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., newspaper, online news site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_user" TEXT /* Twitter username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)
